name: Grapefruit"margarita" Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons corn starch dissolved in 2 tablespoons water
¼ cup each grapefruit, orange and lime segments, skin, pith and pits discarded, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add shallots, jalapenos, and cilantro stems; sweat for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in grapefruit juice, chicken stock, tequila, and lime juice. Bring to a boil.
4. Gradually stir in cornstarch mixture until the sauce begins to thicken (you may not use all of it). Simmer about 20 minutes.
5. Strain through a fine sieve.
6. Fold in citrus segments, cilantro, and Cointreau. Season to taste with salt.
